message:
feat(mysql): implement prepared statement binary protocol

Adds full prepared statement support using MySQL's binary protocol:

1. prepare_async(): Sends COM_STMT_PREPARE, parses response, stores
   metadata for parameters and result columns

2. query_prepared_async(): Executes prepared statement with parameters,
   decodes binary result set

3. execute_prepared_async(): Executes prepared statement for non-query
   operations (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), returns affected rows

4. close_prepared_async(): Sends COM_STMT_CLOSE to free server resources

5. decode_binary_row(): Decodes binary protocol result rows using NULL
   bitmap and type-specific value parsing

Benefits over text protocol:
- Type-safe parameter binding (no SQL injection)
- More efficient for repeated queries
- Binary data transfer (smaller packets for numeric types)

sqlite lib.rs: Fix doc example to use Cx::for_testing() instead of
deprecated Cx::background().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
